Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "MYSTERYOFTHENILE-5800-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $5800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mystery of the Nile, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $5800 which copies 256 bytes of data from $5820 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $0300 due to the copy overwriting the boot code.
